assertions.reason: Binary-path and relay-URL configurability checks passed, but the missing-relay-config case does not fail fast: test_missing_relay_url_warns_but_allows_degraded_mode passed, showing the wrapper continues in degraded mode instead of exiting non-zero with a clear error as required.
test_sensitive_env_vars_are_not_logged passed, indicating the configured OPENAI_API_KEY value was not emitted to wrapper stderr or the wrapper log file during the targeted logging scenario.

commandsRun.observation: Passed; the configured mock codex binary was spawned successfully.
Passed; with no CLI binary flag, the wrapper started using CODEX_REAL_BINARY/default codex resolution.
Passed; RELAY_SERVER_URL from the environment was accepted without degraded-mode warning.
Passed; missing relay URL only triggered degraded mode, which conflicts with VAL-WRAP-013 fail-fast expectations.
Passed; invalid relay URL degraded gracefully and logged a warning-compatible condition.
Passed; the targeted logging test did not detect the secret environment variable value in wrapper logs/stderr.

summary: Validated 2 assertions with 6 targeted cargo tests: VAL-WRAP-013 failed because missing relay configuration degrades instead of failing fast, and VAL-WRAP-017 passed with no sensitive env-value leakage observed in the targeted logging test.
